segments.text: And the word of the LORD came to me, saying,

O son of man, this is what the Lord GOD says to the land of Israel:
‘The end! The end has comeupon the four corners of the land.
segments.speaker: The LORD

segments.text: The end is now upon you, and I will unleash My anger against you. I will judge you according to your ways and repay you for all your abominations.
segments.speaker: The LORD

segments.text:
I will not look on you with pity, nor will I spare you, but I will punish you for your ways and for the abominations among you.
Then you will know that I am the LORD.’
segments.speaker: The LORD

segments.text:
This is what the Lord GOD says:
‘Disaster! An unprecedented disaster—behold, it is coming!
segments.speaker: The LORD

segments.text: The end has come! The end has come! It has roused itself against you. Behold, it has come!
segments.speaker: The LORD

segments.text: Doom has come to you, O inhabitants of the land. The time has come; the day is near; there is panic on the mountainsinstead of shouts of joy.
segments.speaker: The LORD

segments.text: Very soon I will pour out My wrath upon you and vent My anger against you; I will judge you according to your ways and repay you for all your abominations.
segments.speaker: The LORD

segments.text: I will not look on you with pity, nor will I spare you, but I will punish you for your ways and for the abominations among you. Then you will know that it is I, the LORD, who strikes the blow.
segments.speaker: The LORD

segments.text:
Behold, the day is here! It has come! Doom has gone out, the rod has budded,
arrogance has bloomed.
segments.speaker: The LORD

segments.text: Their violence has grown into a rodto punish their wickedness. None of them will remain: none of their multitude, none of their wealth, and nothing of value.
segments.speaker: The LORD

segments.text:
The time has come; the day has arrived. Let the buyer not rejoice and the seller not mourn,
for wrath is upon the whole multitude.
segments.speaker: The LORD

segments.text: The seller will surely not recover what he soldwhile both remain alive. For the vision concerning the whole multitudewill not be revoked, and because of their iniquity, not one of them will preserve his life.
segments.speaker: The LORD

segments.text: They have blown the trumpet and made everything ready, but no one goes to war, for My wrath is upon the whole multitude.
segments.speaker: The LORD

segments.text:
The sword is outside; plague and famine are within. Those in the country will die by the sword, and those in the city will be devoured
by famine and plague.
segments.speaker: The LORD

segments.text: The survivors will escape and live in the mountains, moaning like doves of the valley, each for his own iniquity.
segments.speaker: The LORD

segments.text: Every hand will go limp, and every knee will turn to water.
segments.speaker: The LORD

segments.text: They will put on sackcloth, and terror will overwhelm them. Shame will cover all their faces, and all their heads will be shaved.
segments.speaker: The LORD

segments.text: They will throw their silver into the streets, and their gold will seem unclean. Their silver and gold cannot save themin the day of the wrath of the LORD. They cannot satisfy their appetitesor fill their stomachs with wealth, for it became the stumbling blockthat brought their iniquity.
segments.speaker: The LORD

segments.text: His beautiful ornamentsthey transformed into pride and used them to fashiontheir vile images and detestable idols. Therefore I will make theseinto something unclean for them.
segments.speaker: The LORD

segments.text: And I will hand these things overas plunder to foreigners and loot to the wicked of the earth, who will defile them.
segments.speaker: The LORD

segments.text: I will turn My face away from them, and they will defile My treasured place. Violent men will enter it, and they will defile it.
segments.speaker: The LORD

segments.text:
Forge the chain, for the land is full of crimes of bloodshed,
and the city is full of violence.
segments.speaker: Unknown

segments.text: So I will bring the most wicked of nationsto take possession of their houses. I will end the pride of the mighty, and their holy places will be profaned.
segments.speaker: The LORD

segments.text: Anguish is coming! They will seek peace, but find none.
segments.speaker: Unknown

segments.text:
Disaster upon disaster will come, and rumor after rumor. Then they will seek a vision from a prophet, but instruction from the priests will perish,
as will counsel from the elders.
segments.speaker: Unknown

segments.text:
The king will mourn, the prince will be clothed with despair,
and the hands of the people of the land will tremble. I will deal with them according to their conduct, and I will judge them by their own standards.
Then they will know that I am the LORD.’
segments.speaker: The LORD
